description: Fixed 18-set current-API sanity-check rerun summary for the archived LLM-handled ambiguity surface in NRR-Phi.

divergent_sets.note: Archived output preserved the two-way yesterday-scope split; the rerun output did not.

carry_forward_notes: epi_en_03 and epi_en_08 preserve the same broad ambiguity family but reshape subreadings across providers.
lex_en_02 / anthropic and str_en_08 / anthropic overgenerate beyond the archived compact read while preserving the core ambiguity family.
scope_note: This rerun is a bounded stability check only. It is not a human semantic-adequacy adjudication and not a perfect identity reproduction claim.
